hero.title: Luxury Living in Transylvania
hero.subtitle: Discover Exceptional Properties Across Romania's Most Prestigious Addresses

heritage.title: Heritage & Modernity
heritage.description: We blend centuries of Transylvanian architectural heritage with contemporary luxury design, creating homes that honor the past while embracing the future.

curated.title: Curated Portfolio
curated.description: Each property in our collection is hand-selected to meet the highest standards of luxury and exclusivity, ensuring only the finest make it to our clients.

service.title: White-Glove Service
service.description: From first viewing to final signature, our dedicated team ensures an unparalleled experience tailored to your unique preferences and lifestyle.

about.subtitle: About Transylvania Grand Estate
about.title: Redefining Luxury Real Estate in Romania
about.description: With over a decade of expertise, we are Romania's premier luxury real estate consultancy, connecting discerning buyers with exceptional properties across Transylvania and beyond.

cta.title: Ready to Find Your Dream Property?
cta.subtitle: Let our expert team guide you through Romania's finest luxury residences.

hero.title: Our Developer Partners
hero.subtitle: Trusted Partners Building Romania's Finest Properties

DevelopersPage.description: We partner with Romania's most respected property developers to bring you exclusive access to premium residential projects across Transylvania. Each developer in our network has been carefully vetted for quality, reliability, and design excellence.

cta.title: Want to Partner With Us?
cta.subtitle: If you're a developer with premium projects, we'd love to hear from you.

noResults.title: No Properties Found
noResults.description: Try adjusting your filters to find what you're looking for.

cta.title: Can't Find What You're Looking For?
cta.subtitle: Our team has access to exclusive off-market properties.

hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: A Decade of Luxury Real Estate Excellence

founding.title: Founded on Passion
founding.description: Established in 2014, Transylvania Grand Estate was born from a vision to transform Romania's luxury real estate landscape. Our founders recognized the untapped potential of Transylvania's architectural heritage and set out to create a consultancy that matches world-class properties with discerning buyers.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To connect discerning individuals with extraordinary properties that reflect their aspirations and lifestyle. We believe that a home is more than walls and a roof — it's a statement of who you are and how you choose to live.

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.description: Every client relationship begins with understanding. We listen, we learn, and we deliver beyond expectations. Our intimate knowledge of Romania's luxury market, combined with a global perspective, allows us to offer unparalleled guidance at every step.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We set the highest standards in everything we do, from property selection to client service, ensuring an experience worthy of the exceptional properties we represent.

discretion.title: Discretion
discretion.description: We understand that luxury transactions require the utmost confidentiality. Your privacy is our priority at every stage of the process.

heritage.title: Heritage
heritage.description: We celebrate Romania's rich architectural and cultural heritage, preserving the stories that make each property unique while integrating modern luxury.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We embrace cutting-edge technology and forward-thinking approaches to marketing, presentation, and client communication.

hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.subtitle: We'd Love to Hear From You
